title: Pandemic Day Act
description: Pandemic Day Act (Pandemic Day Act). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the Pandemic Day Act .

provisions.title: Pandemic Observance Day
provisions.content: 2 Throughout Canada, in each and every year, the 11th day of March is to be known as “Pandemic Observance Day”.
